name: @moxxy/plugin-channel-whatsapp
description: WhatsApp channel for moxxy via Baileys (UNOFFICIAL WhatsApp Web protocol — violates WhatsApp's Terms of Service; the linked number can be banned, use a secondary number). QR device-link pairing, JID allow-list, voice-note transcription, dedicated isolated runner.
author: Michal Makowski <michal.makowski97@gmail.com>

requirements.name: @moxxy/plugin-vault
requirements.hint: whatsapp resolves the vault from the service registry for its consent receipt + owner JID + allow-list; @moxxy/plugin-vault must load first

setup.title: WhatsApp channel (UNOFFICIAL API — read this first)
setup.description: This channel uses Baileys, an UNOFFICIAL WhatsApp Web client. Automating a personal account violates WhatsApp's Terms of Service and CAN GET THE PHONE NUMBER PERMANENTLY BANNED. Strongly consider a secondary number. Pairing itself happens later via QR (moxxy whatsapp setup).

fields.label: Type 'yes' to acknowledge the ToS/ban risk (anything else keeps the channel disabled)
Extra allowed WhatsApp JIDs (comma-separated, e.g. 15551234567@s.whatsapp.net) — your own Note-to-Self chat is always allowed
